title: Marcia Linton
compiled_truth: Marcia Linton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-05-25), Marcia Linton sent 16 and received 293 emails, totalling 309 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (10), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (8), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (5), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (5), [Risk Group](people/risk-group) (5).
